summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SciPost Pairwise gap charts functionality. All requested features are working correctly - Abstract mode shows gap charts, bars render with proper rates, and navigation between Abstract/Extract modes works seamlessly.

minor_console_warnings.issue: 401 error and CSP warning in console logs
minor_console_warnings.details: 401 error likely from auth check, CSP warning from worker creation - neither affects gap chart functionality

passed_tests: SciPost (Abstract) gap chart displays correctly with data
Gap chart bars render with proper rates (62.4%, 61.7%, 50%)
SciPost (Extract) gap chart displays correctly with data
Gap chart bars render in Extract mode (76.6%, 57.1%, 52.9%)
Navigation between Abstract/Extract modes works correctly
Gap chart sections have proper data-testids for testing
Gap data aggregation logic works correctly (console logs confirm)
Gap chart visibility logic works (shows/hides based on data availability)
All three gap categories render: Small (≤1.0), Medium (1.0–2.0), Large (>2.0)
